tools.name: snapshot
tools.description: Capture the current session state (turn, tokens, message count, last_turn_ref) and append one JSONL line to .stado/session-recordings.jsonl. Invoke manually to record a checkpoint; the background-tick lifecycle records automatically on every turn boundary when loaded via [plugins].background.
tools.schema: {"type":"object","properties":{"note":{"type":"string","description":"Optional free-form tag stored with this recording."}}}
